# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_pool_member (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `member` (String) Specify the member name. For `type=storage` it is a storage name. For `type=vm` either vmid or vm name could be used.
- `poolid` (String) The pool ID.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the pool member.
- `type` (String) Member type to add/remove from the pool.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) A short message on what the module did.
